title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Om Book Shop

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Om Book Shop
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
